basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 44 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) has released the official Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 notification on the official website. A total of 44 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Assistant Professor Grade II: Max 32 years. Assistant Professor Grade I: Max 35 years.
age_limit.details: Assistant Professor Grade II: Maximum age limit is 32 years. Assistant Professor Grade I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a very good academic record throughout. For Computer Science background: BE/B. Tech/BS in Computer Science/Mathematics and Computing/Information Technology with a Ph.D. in related fields.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor Grade II (All Departments/Schools): Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a very good academic record throughout. Contract basis. Assistant Professor Grade I (All Departments/Schools): Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a very good academic record throughout. Minimum three years of industrial/ research/ teaching experience, excluding, however, the experience gained while pursuing Ph.D. Assistant Professor Grade II (School of Innovation): Ph.D., the qualifications and experience criteria are as per Institute General Eligibility Criteria (Ref. Point 8(a)). Candidates without a Ph.D. satisfying all criteria of Assistant Professor Grade I, except having only 5+ years of teaching / research / professional experience, may be appointed as Assistant Professor Grade II with appropriate pay based on the number of years of experience. After satisfying the experience criteria required for Assistant Professor Grade I, they will be moved to Assistant Professor Grade I. Contract basis. Assistant Professor Grade I (School of Innovation): Ph.D., the qualifications and experience criteria are as per Institute General Eligibility Criteria (Ref. Point 8(b)). Assistant Professor Grade I (School of Innovation - without Ph.D.): Minimum of 8 years of teaching / research / professional experience is required. However, such candidates will be required to obtain their Ph.D. within 5 years from the date of joining IIT Indore.

salary_details.pay_scale: Assistant Professor Grade II: ₹70,900/- to ₹1,39,140/-. Assistant Professor Grade I: ₹1,01,500/- to ₹1,94,220/-.
salary_details.details: Assistant Professor Grade II: Pay Level 10, Minimum Basic Pay ₹70,900/- per month. Total emoluments approximately ₹1,39,140/-. Assistant Professor Grade I: Pay Level 12, Minimum Basic Pay ₹1,01,500/- per month. Total emoluments approximately ₹1,94,220/-.

selection_process: publication records and requirements of individual academic school. Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Assistant Professor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Indore Assistant Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor Grade II (All Departments/Schools): Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a very good academic record throughout. Contract basis. Assistant Professor Grade I (All Departments/Schools): Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a very good academic record throughout. Minimum three years of industrial/ research/ teaching experience, excluding, however, the experience gained while pursuing Ph.D. Assistant Professor Grade II (School of Innovation): Ph.D., the qualifications and experience criteria are as per Institute General Eligibility Criteria (Ref. Point 8(a)). Candidates without a Ph.D. satisfying all criteria of Assistant Professor Grade I, except having only 5+ years of teaching / research / professional experience, may be appointed as Assistant Professor Grade II with appropriate pay based on the number of years of experience. After satisfying the experience criteria required for Assistant Professor Grade I, they will be moved to Assistant Professor Grade I. Contract basis. Assistant Professor Grade I (School of Innovation): Ph.D., the qualifications and experience criteria are as per Institute General Eligibility Criteria (Ref. Point 8(b)). Assistant Professor Grade I (School of Innovation - without Ph.D.): Minimum of 8 years of teaching / research / professional experience is required. However, such candidates will be required to obtain their Ph.D. within 5 years from the date of joining IIT Indore.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor Grade II: Maximum age limit is 32 years. Assistant Professor Grade I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor Grade II: Pay Level 10, Minimum Basic Pay ₹70,900/- per month. Total emoluments approximately ₹1,39,140/-. Assistant Professor Grade I: Pay Level 12, Minimum Basic Pay ₹1,01,500/- per month. Total emoluments approximately ₹1,94,220/-.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on qualification, experience, research, publication records and requirements of individual academic school. Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Indore Assistant Professor recruitment is 21st July 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 44 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor (Grade I & II) positions at the Indian Institute of Technology Indore. These vacancies are for backlog positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch, along with a very good academic record throughout. Specific requirements may vary slightly by department.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Assistant Professor Grade I and Grade II?
faq.answer: For Assistant Professor Grade II, the maximum age limit is 32 years. For Assistant Professor Grade I, the maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: Assistant Professor Grade II will receive a salary in Pay Level 10, with a minimum basic pay of ₹70,900/-. Assistant Professor Grade I will be in Pay Level 12, with a minimum basic pay of ₹1,01,500/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IIT Indore Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications, experience, research, and publication records. This is followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates regarding fees.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates with a Master's degree apply for this post?
faq.answer: Generally, a Ph.D. is the minimum qualification. However, for specific cases like the School of Innovation, candidates without a Ph.D. but with significant experience might be considered for Grade II, with the requirement to obtain a Ph.D. later.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Indore Assistant Professor positions is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website and fill out the application form electronically.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read the notification thoroughly before applying.
